case_title: JOHNNY LEM VS. YUN FAI CHOY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY LEM, JOHNNY AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, YUN FAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBIYS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPROTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED OCT-28-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, YUN FAI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEM, JOHNNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOY, YUN FAI $1,079.45 PRINCIPAL, $87.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,166.95, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY LOSS TO BE $4317.79 AND ATTRIBUTES 75% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
